subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was received and, praise be unto God, thou art, with the utmost diligence, rendering successful service [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید الحمد لله بکمال همت بخدمت موفقی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @nearness and remoteness, @law of pilgrimage, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
